name: Garlic Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Drop garlic cloves into boiling water for about 5 minutes until tender.
2. Peel and chop the garlic, then soak in Maple syrup for 20 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, cream butter, sugars, eggs, and vanilla together until light and fluffy.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Add to the cream mixture.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts. Drain the garlic and add it to the cookie batter.
6. Blend well.
7. Drop cookie batter by tablespoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes, until lightly browned.
9. Remove from oven and cool on racks.
